title: Build RoadScreen screen recording
description: Create RoadScreen: screen recording, video editing, sharing. Loom alternative. /mo. Instant playback, no downloads required.
result:
Built RoadScreen - Professional screen recording and video platform (Product #77). Live at https://dc324fd9.blackroad-admin.pages.dev

Features:
- HD screen recording (720p/1080p/1440p/4K at 60fps)
- Webcam overlay with green screen support
- Dual audio recording (system + microphone with noise cancellation)
- Live annotations (draw, highlight, text, arrows)
- Built-in video editor (trim, cut, merge, transitions, captions)
- AI-powered editing (auto-remove silence, filler words, AI captions)
- Instant sharing via link, upload to YouTube/Vimeo
- Cloud storage (10GB-unlimited)
- Keyboard shortcuts and hotkeys

Use cases: Education, business, gaming, development, design, marketing

Pricing: FREE (720p, 5min videos) → $15/mo Pro (4K, unlimited, AI) → $25/user/mo Team

🤖 Built with Claude Code | Product #77 of 200+
